max_tile.formula: min(observed_max_tile / 2048, 1.0); observed_max_tile >= 2048 earns the full 0.70 component

gameplay_process.note: evidence of real gameplay progression, not just opening the page

final_report.note: final Markdown records max tile, score, final-board screenshot, and screenshot paths

integrity.note: no manipulation of the board/result outside normal gameplay unless clearly disclosed

pass_requirement: observed_max_tile >= 2048 AND total >= 0.90; the tile component alone cannot pass the task
evidence_note: Score the observed run from screenshots/result files, not from a precomputed answer. The max-tile component is the dominant driver but the other components are scored independently.
